Name: Bank Account Statement
Description: Certified copy of account transactions from bank, showing credits and debits.

Name: Payment Transaction Receipt
Description: UPI/IMPS/NEFT transaction screenshot or receipt with timestamp and reference ID.

Name: Messaging App Screenshot
Description: Screenshot of conversation on WhatsApp, Telegram, Skype, or similar platform.

Name: Call Detail Records (CDR)
Description: Subscriber call records from telecom operator showing incoming/outgoing calls and IMEI.

Name: IMEI Registration Record
Description: CEIR or TAFCOP records confirming device registration and associated SIM cards.

Name: Bank KYC Documents
Description: Know Your Customer documents (Aadhaar, PAN, photo) linked to a bank account.

Name: Seized Device Forensic Dump
Description: Forensic extraction from a seized mobile device (call logs, messages, installed apps).

Name: Server/Application Login Log
Description: IP address and timestamp logs from an application server or platform.

Name: Cryptocurrency Transaction Record
Description: On-chain transaction record for a crypto wallet address (USDT, BTC, ETH).

Name: Victim's Sworn Statement
Description: Written statement by victim recorded before magistrate or IO.

Name: UPI Transaction Log (NPCI)
Description: Transaction log from NPCI or payment app showing UPI ID and VPA linkage.

Name: Aadhaar/PAN Verification Record
Description: UIDAI or IT Dept record confirming identity of account holder.

Name: Email Communication Record
Description: Email thread showing communication related to the offence.

Name: Social Media Profile/Post
Description: Screenshot or archived record of social media profile or communication.
